{{Quote|Since there's nothing much below or above the ecliptic around there, that would put his point of origin somewhere in the Senex or Juvex Sector, or in the Ninth Quadrant, say, between the Greeb-Streebling Cluster and the Noopiths.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Children of the Jedi (novel)">[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]</ref>}}
The '''Ninth Quadrant''' was a region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] in the [[Bozhnee sector/Legends|Bozhnee sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], near the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex]] and [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex]] [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==Description==
The Ninth Quadrant included the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]], [[Garnib]] and [[Ossel II]]. It also contained the [[Greeb-Streebling Cluster/Legends|Greeb-Streebling Cluster]] and [[The Noopiths/Legends|the Noopiths]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
{{Quote|The Ninth Quadrant's pretty isolated; the systems there are far apart. It would be the ideal place for the Jedi Knights to hide their families, once they knew the Emperor was out to destroy them.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|<ref name="Children of the Jedi (novel)" />}}
Originally, this area was unclaimed for a large part of galactic history. When the [[Noble/Legends|nobles]] from the adjacent [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] felt threatened by the approaching [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and the forces of [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]], they claimed a number of Rimward [[Star system/Legends|systems]] around [[700 BBY]]. They became known as the Ninth Quadrant, a reference to the early days of the Senex-Juvex worlds, which had been divided into eight quadrants.<ref name="TEA" />

In the century following the [[Third Nantama Synod]] in [[553 BBY]], the Senex-Juvex were forced to hand the area over to the Republic and it became a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Bozhnee sector/Legends|Bozhnee sector]]. Among [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], the name "Ninth Quadrant" stuck and among the Senex and Juvex families, the Ninth Quadrant is still referred to as part of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], while officially being part of the Outer Rim.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
